user_query: List all SmartSales locations, then retrieve the full details of the first result.

plan.query: List all SmartSales locations, then retrieve the full details of the first result.
plan.reasoning: Two steps are needed: one to get the locations and a second to get the details of the first location. The second step relies on the output of the first step.

steps.task: Retrieve the full details of the first location returned from step 1 (if any). State that there are no results if step 1 returned none.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from step 2 to present the details of the first SmartSales location.
